title: Dev v0.5.2 Shared Save All
notes:
Enables Save All to Shared Database so Dev can safely merge local item changes into the shared GitHub database with duplicate handling, conflict blocking, and backups.

Changes:
- Enables Save All to Shared Database.
- Adds Dev name setting.
- Adds GitHub token setting for shared save.
- Adds Clear Shared Token button.
- Save All pulls latest shared database from GitHub first.
- Save All merges local items into shared database.
- Exact duplicates are ignored.
- New non-conflicting local items are added to shared.
- Conflicts block the save instead of overwriting.
- Creates before/after local backup cache files.
- Pushes merged shared database to GitHub through Contents API.
- Shows save report with counts, backup paths, and commit link.
- Refresh Shared Database remains available.
- Submit Update to Master remains disabled for now.

GitHub token requirement for shared save:
- Repository: ColbyDC/apl-helper-updates
- Permission: Contents Read and write
- Metadata Read-only
